component.name: Claude Code Usage Monitor
component.summary: Real-time terminal monitor for Claude Code token usage and analytics

description.p: Claude Code Usage Monitor provides a Rich-based terminal dashboard for monitoring Claude Code token and session usage in real time. It reads the local Claude session data and displays live statistics including token consumption, cost estimates, session progress, and plan-limit tracking.

ul.li: Live real-time token and cost tracking with auto-refresh
Support for Pro, Max5, Max20 and custom token plans
Daily and monthly aggregated usage table views
P90-based automatic token limit calculation for custom plans
Configurable timezone, time format (12h/24h), and display theme
Light, dark, and classic colour themes with auto-detection
